summary: Iter 189 acceptance criteria FULLY VERIFIED (frontend-only). All 5 test areas PASSED for the enterprise desktop shell wrapping /employee-add. (1) DESKTOP ADD (1920px): Enterprise shell renders — breadcrumb 'Dashboard › Employee Management › Add New Employee', 6 section tabs (ent-tab-sec-identity/employment/actual-salary/compliance/statutory/family) all present, left panel shows 'New Entry' amber badge + Completion 1/8 pill + 8-row checklist (Firm selected already ticked), sticky bottom bar with ent-cancel/ent-save-draft/ent-primary-save. Kankani firm already active. Filled name TESTQA-ITER189 + mobile 9998887189, Completion pill live-updated 1/8 → 3/8 (Name & Mobile rows ticked). Clicked ent-primary-save → review modal opened (review-scroll visible) → review-confirm → POST /api/admin/employees → 200 OK with {ok:true, user_id:'user_7a5c8a7203ab', employee_code:'KEPS0001', temp_pin:'041179'}. Employee created successfully. (2) SECTION TABS: click ent-tab-sec-statutory → #sec-statutory scrolled to top (top=261 in 1080px viewport), then click ent-tab-sec-identity → #sec-identity scrolled back to top (top=118). scrollIntoView via nativeID working. (3) DESKTOP EDIT (1920px): /employee-add?user_id=user_44cd6f561da0 (TEST50 SURENDRA SINGH) — left panel shows 'SURENDRA SINGH' name, green 'Active' badge, employee code 50, Type STAFF, Designation GREY CHECKER, and 'Open Full Profile' button (ent-full-profile) which correctly navigates to /employee-master?user_id=user_44cd6f561da0. Form fields prefilled (name SURENDRA SINGH, father RAM SINGH, gender Male). Primary button shows 'Save' (not 'Create Employee'), ent-save-draft is CORRECTLY HIDDEN in edit mode. Clicked ent-primary-save — no error banner surfaced (save path clean). Breadcrumb shows 'Employee Details · 50'. (4) MOBILE REGRESSION (390x844): all enterprise testIDs (ent-tab-*, ent-cancel, ent-save-draft, ent-primary-save, ent-full-profile) return false — enterprise shell correctly suppressed. Mobile premium header 'Add New Employee' + subtitle 'New hire — direct entry by HR / employer admin' + gradient icon chip renders correctly. All 4 sections (Identity, Employment, Statutory, Family) render. Form scrolls normally. (5) CLEANUP: TESTQA-ITER189 (user_id user_7a5c8a7203ab, code KEPS0001) DELETED via DELETE /api/admin/employees/user_7a5c8a7203ab → 200 {ok:true, cascade:{attendance:0,leaves:0,tickets:0,payslips:0,notifications:0,user_sessions:0}}. Verified absent from employee list post-delete. Total Employees KPI back to 127.
critical_code_review_comments: employee-add.tsx lines 112-120: SECTION_TABS array cleanly defines 6 sections with icons; wired via scrollToSection using document.getElementById + scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth'}). Anchors implemented via <View nativeID={anchorId}> in SectionHeader (line 2026) — renders as id={anchorId} in react-native-web. Clean pattern.

employee-add.tsx line 246: canSwitchFirm correctly disabled in edit mode. line 701-717: enterprisePrimary swaps between 'Create Employee' (opens review modal) and 'Save' (direct submit) based on editUserId. line 1936: ent-save-draft correctly conditional on !editUserId (hidden in edit). line 793-799: status badge switches between 'Active' green (edit) and 'New Entry' amber (add) correctly.
Left panel checklist (lines 682-691) uses live-derived form-field checks — 3/8 confirmed after Name+Mobile fill in browser. doneCount pill updates in real time. Perfect UX.
isWide gate uses winW >= 1024 with Platform.OS === 'web' — correctly hides enterprise shell on mobile (verified at 390px).

Pre-existing console noise (unchanged, not blocking): 'Invalid style property outline/background/padding' RN-web long-form warnings, REPLACE 'index' navigator warning post-login (Iter 184 already noted), shadow* deprecated → boxShadow — none affect functionality.

success_rate.backend: N/A (frontend-only per request; incidental /api/admin/employees POST=200 and DELETE=200 verified)
success_rate.frontend: 100% — all 5 acceptance items pass (desktop add + review + create, section tab scroll, desktop edit prefill + Open Full Profile nav + Save without error, mobile regression clean, cleanup successful)

seed_data_creation: Created TESTQA-ITER189 (user_7a5c8a7203ab, KEPS0001, Kankani cmp_527fecdd7c, mobile 9998887189) then DELETED it. No lingering test data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter 189 shipped enterprise desktop shell around EXISTING /employee-add — all wiring correct. Key testIDs: ent-tab-{sec-identity|sec-employment|sec-actual-salary|sec-compliance|sec-statutory|sec-family}, ent-cancel, ent-save-draft (add-only), ent-primary-save, ent-full-profile (edit-only). Section anchors use React Native nativeID which maps to DOM id — scrollIntoView works. isWide gate = Platform.OS === 'web' && winW >= 1024. Left panel checklist is derived live from form state (doneCount pill updates as you type). Add-mode primary click opens review modal (review-scroll → review-confirm → POST /api/admin/employees). Edit-mode primary click submits directly (no review). No new bugs. Nothing to fix.
